quality_expectations: must begin from GEOFlow's existing frontend contract and current theme system
must discover available themes and keep target_theme_id explicit before editing
must choose edit_theme, clone, or hybrid mode before proposing outputs
must preserve routing, SEO, and data-query boundaries unless explicitly expanded
must prefer preview-first theme forks or preview-safe packages over direct live replacement
must map reference styles or optimization goals onto GEOFlow modules instead of copying raw pages verbatim
must present finalize choices as publish_as_new_theme or replace_base_theme only after preview review
